params.name: Bronze Longhu Cup
params.description:
On Sept 9, 1959 AD, the picture of Bronze Longhu Cup was published in the magazine ANTIQUES.
Bronze Longhu Cup is a bronze ware of the Shang Dynasty with an overall height of 5.5 cm and a weight of 26.2 kg. The bronze ware is decorated with exquisite decorations. The refined patterns and lines are the fine products of Shang Dynasty bronzes, and are recognized as national first-class cultural relics!
